text:
/ci1 2 要救助者、発見しました！
避難用転送装置が近くにあったはず。
そこまで連れていきましょう！

/ci1 2 There's a survivor who needs help! There
should be a Teleporter nearby to help him
evacuate. Let's get him over there fast!

要救助者、発見しました！
避難用転送装置が近くにあったはず。
そこまで連れていきましょう！
<c ffff00>市民が戦闘不能になるとクエスト失敗！<c>

There's a survivor who needs help! There
should be a Teleporter nearby to help him
evacuate. Let's get him over there fast!

You will fail this quest if the civilian
becomes incapacitated!
